query: What does the transaction add map COTRN01 contain?

results.name: RECEIVE-TRNADD-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COTRN02C.cbl
Program: COTRN02C - CICS COBOL Program - Add a new Transaction to TRANSACT file
Paragraph: RECEIVE-TRNADD-SCREEN (lines 539-551)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN02, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
results.summary: paragraph RECEIVE-TRNADD-SCREEN in COTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN02, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
RECEIVE-TRNADD-SCREEN.

           EXEC CICS RECEIVE
                     MAP('COTRN2A')
                     MAPSET('COTRN02')
                     INTO(COTRN2AI)
                     RESP(WS-RESP-CD)
                     RESP2(WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COTRN02C.cbl
Program: COTRN02C - CICS COBOL Program - Add a new Transaction to TRANSACT file
Paragraph: SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN (lines 516-538)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN02, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
results.summary: paragraph SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN in COTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN02, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN.

           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO

           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COTRN2AO

           EXEC CICS SEND
                     MAP('COTRN2A')
                     MAPSET('COTRN02')
                     FROM(COTRN2AO)
                     ERASE
                     CURSOR
           END-EXEC.

           EXEC CICS RETURN
                     TRANSID (WS-TRANID)
                     COMMAREA (CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
      *              LENGTH(LENGTH OF CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      RECEIVE-TRNADD-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: ADD-TRANSACTION
results.preamble:
File: COTRN02C.cbl
Program: COTRN02C - CICS COBOL Program - Add a new Transaction to TRANSACT file
Paragraph: ADD-TRANSACTION (lines 442-470)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN02, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM ENDBR-TRANSACT-FILE, PERFORM READPREV-TRANSACT-FILE, PERFORM STARTBR-TRANSACT-FILE, PERFORM WRITE-TRANSACT-FILE
results.summary: paragraph ADD-TRANSACTION in COTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN02, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM ENDBR-TRANSACT-FILE, PERFORM READPREV-TRANSACT-FILE, PERFORM STARTBR-TRANSACT-FILE, PERFORM WRITE-TRANSACT-FILE. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
ADD-TRANSACTION.

           MOVE HIGH-VALUES TO TRAN-ID
           PERFORM STARTBR-TRANSACT-FILE
           PERFORM READPREV-TRANSACT-FILE
           PERFORM ENDBR-TRANSACT-FILE
           MOVE TRAN-ID     TO WS-TRAN-ID-N
           ADD 1 TO WS-TRAN-ID-N
           INITIALIZE TRAN-RECORD
           MOVE WS-TRAN-ID-N         TO TRAN-ID
           MOVE TTYPCDI  OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-TYPE-CD
           MOVE TCATCDI  OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-CAT-CD
           MOVE TRNSRCI  OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-SOURCE
           MOVE TDESCI   OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-DESC
           COMPUTE WS-TRAN-AMT-N = FUNCTION NUMVAL-C(TRNAMTI OF
           COTRN2AI)
           MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT-N TO TRAN-AMT
           MOVE CARDNINI OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-CARD-NUM
           MOVE MIDI     OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-MERCHANT-ID
           MOVE MNAMEI   OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-MERCHANT-NAME
           MOVE MCITYI   OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-MERCHANT-CITY
           MOVE MZIPI    OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP
           MOVE TORIGDTI OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-ORIG-TS
           MOVE TPROCDTI OF COTRN2AI TO TRAN-PROC-TS
           PERFORM WRITE-TRANSACT-FILE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      COPY-LAST-TRAN-DATA
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS.

           MOVE -1              TO ACTIDINL OF COTRN2AI
           MOVE SPACES          TO ACTIDINI OF COTRN2AI
                                   CARDNINI OF COTRN2AI
                                   TTYPCDI  OF COTRN2AI
                                   TCATCDI  OF COTRN2AI
                                   TRNSRCI  OF COTRN2AI
                                   TRNAMTI  OF COTRN2AI
                                   TDESCI   OF COTRN2AI
                                   TORIGDTI OF COTRN2AI
                                   TPROCDTI OF COTRN2AI
                                   MIDI     OF COTRN2AI
                                   MNAMEI   OF COTRN2AI
                                   MCITYI   OF COTRN2AI
                                   MZIPI    OF COTRN2AI
                                   CONFIRMI OF COTRN2AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE.

results.name: COTRN01
results.content:
COTRN01 DFHMSD CTRL=(ALARM,FREEKB),                                    -
               EXTATT=YES,                                             -
               LANG=COBOL,                                             -
               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM

results.name: READPREV-TRANSACT-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COTRN02C.cbl
Program: COTRN02C - CICS COBOL Program - Add a new Transaction to TRANSACT file
Paragraph: READPREV-TRANSACT-FILE (lines 673-701)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN02, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph READPREV-TRANSACT-FILE in COTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN02, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
READPREV-TRANSACT-FILE.

           EXEC CICS READPREV
                DATASET   (WS-TRANSACT-FILE)
                INTO      (TRAN-RECORD)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF TRAN-RECORD)
                RIDFLD    (TRAN-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF TRAN-ID)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN DFHRESP(ENDFILE)
                   MOVE ZEROS TO TRAN-ID
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup Transaction...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO ACTIDINL OF COTRN2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                    ENDBR-TRANSACT-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: READ-CXACAIX-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COTRN02C.cbl
Program: COTRN02C - CICS COBOL Program - Add a new Transaction to TRANSACT file
Paragraph: READ-CXACAIX-FILE (lines 576-608)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN02, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph READ-CXACAIX-FILE in COTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN02, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
READ-CXACAIX-FILE.

           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (WS-CXACAIX-FILE)
                INTO      (CARD-XREF-RECORD)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF CARD-XREF-RECORD)
                RIDFLD    (XREF-ACCT-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF XREF-ACCT-ID)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Account ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO ACTIDINL OF COTRN2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup Acct in XREF AIX file...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO ACTIDINL OF COTRN2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      READ-CCXREF-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
